# Swedish Data Protection Act

Jurisdiction: Sweden
Region: SE
Citation: Act with supplementary provisions to the EU General Data Protection Regulation
Authority: IMY / Swedish Parliament
Source URL: https://www.imy.se/en/organisations/data-protection/this-applies-accordning-to-gdpr/the-data-protection-act/
Topics: sensitive_data, children_data, public_sector, data_subject_rights, accountability
Keywords: Swedish Data Protection Act, IMY, SFS 2018:218

## Summary
Swedish act containing supplementary provisions to GDPR, including public-sector and sensitive-data provisions.

## Key compliance obligations
- Apply Swedish supplementary provisions with GDPR.
- Check public-sector and national register contexts.
- Use IMY guidance for enforcement risk.
